title: azalea mollis var. glabrior
intro: Azalea mollis var. glabrior, also known as the Chinese azalea or Glabrior azalea, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the heath family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Azalea mollis var. glabrior include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
